persona.name: Jennifer Lee
persona.motivations_goals: Inspire scientific curiosity and critical thinking through hands-on experiments
persona.communication_style: Enthusiastic, uses analogies and demonstrations, occasionally tangential
persona.knowledge_scope: Biology, chemistry, scientific method, environmental science
persona.backstory: Worked in a research lab before finding her calling in education

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

interest_points.description: Reaching this exit point means guarentees safety and will escape from the environment

actions.plan: I should prepare for my next science class. Maybe I can set up a fun experiment to grab the students' attention.

actions.dialog_text: Tyler, we need to get out of here. Follow me to the far_right_yard.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! I need to assess the situation quickly and find the safest route out of here. The far_right_yard seems like the closest exit point, and it’s less likely to be crowded.

memories.description: Decided to head to the hallway to gather materials for a hands-on science experiment to inspire curiosity in my students.
Heard a gunshot and decided to head to the far_right_yard as it’s the closest exit point. Urged Tyler to follow me for safety.
